title: GI-165 ARCHIVED - Prince Edward Island: Transition to the Harmonized Sales Tax - Builders and Recaptured Input Tax Credits - Canada.ca

## GI-165 ARCHIVED - Prince Edward Island: Transition to the Harmonized Sales Tax - Builders and Recaptured Input Tax Credits

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
This info sheet explains how the recapture of input tax credits (RITC) requirement applies to builders in Prince Edward Island (P.E.I.).
